title: viola rotundifolia
intro: Viola rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved violet, is a flowering plant in the viola genus that grows in woodland areas and wet meadows in Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of Viola rotundifolia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
